name: Fern
description: Fern is the young mage apprentice of [Frieren](https://anilist.co/character/176754/Frieren) and accompanies her as a member of her party. She is an orphaned war refugee originally from the Southern Lands, later adopted by [Heiter](https://anilist.co/character/184310/Heiter) and placed under Frieren's care.

name: Rikka Takanashi
description: __Height:__ 150 cm (4'11") Rikka Takanashi is an active Chuunibyou, who still has the syndrome. Her delusional syndrome involves her right eye which she calls her "Wicked Eye," which, according to her, wields darkness tamed by the power of a pure heart. In reality, her so-called "Wicked Eye" is nothing more than a colored contact lens which she conceals underneath an eyepatch. Because of his former life, he is careful not to get carried away and become arrogant. As a result, he is extremely self-aware and humble because he does not want to revert to his old self. name: Kurumi Tokisaki
description: **Height:** 157 cm Kurumi is the third spirit who appeared after [Tohka](https://anilist.co/character/65259) and [Yoshino](https://anilist.co/character/70603). She has a split personality: that of a gentle, mysterious highschool girl with a slow talking pattern, and that of a psychopathic killer. She is very aggressive in her actions which makes it harder for [Shidou](https://anilist.co/character/65257) to capture her. ~!Kurumi has the archangel Zafkiel, and has the power to control over time. name: Nana Oosaki
description: __Height:__ 162 cm (5'4") One of the two titular characters of the series, Oosaki Nana may look like a tough punk rocker, but she has a kind heart and is a devoted friend. Abandoned by her parents and raised by her grandmother, Nana was expelled from high school after she was falsely accused of prostitution. name: Reiner Braun
description: __Height__: 185 cm (6'1") Member of the Survey Corps and former cadet of the 104th Training Corps. Reiner is a passionate and strong-willed young man with a strong sense of duty. He ranked 2nd in his training class upon graduation, finishing behind only [Mikasa](https://anilist.co/character/40881). His comrades have great trust in him, and he is stated to be the "big brother" of the 104th cadets.

name: Simon
description: **Height:** 156 cm (5`1") Simon is the protagonist of the story, a short and un-intimidating fourteen year old boy at the beginning of this tale. He was born in Jiiha Village and was raised by his parents until the age of seven, when his parents were killed in an underground avalanche caused by an earthquake.

name: Gilgamesh
description: __Height:__ 182 cm Gilgamesh is the King of Uruk, said to have reigned during the Sumer Dynasty in Mesopotamia 5000 years ago. He's the namesake Hero described in the Epic of Gilgamesh, making him the most ancient Hero on which all the others legends were modeled. This grants him the title of King of Heroes and, within his Gates of Babylon, the prototypes of all the Noble Phantasms of the Heroes yet to come. name: Norman
description: __Height:__ 145 cm __Farm Identifier:__ 22194 Norman seems to be logical, well-meaning, and devoted, with a slightly naive side. He can easily plan his actions in advance and he anticipates on other's actions. He is one of the top 3 ranking orphans, along with [Emma](https://anilist.co/character/121725/Emma) and [Ray](https://anilist.co/character/121724/Ray). Norman loves Emma and he is helpful and loyal towards her.

name: Lain Iwakura
description: Lain, the main character of Serial Experiments Lain, is a 14 year old girl who uncovers her true nature through the series. She is first depicted as a shy junior high school student with few friends or interests. ~!She later grows multiple, bolder personalities, both in the physical and Wired worlds.!~

name: Houtarou Oreki
description: __Height:__ 172 cm (5'8") Oreki is a high-schooler with messy brown hair and green eyes. Due to his very lazy lifestyle, he almost always has a tired or bored look on his face. His hair is especially very messy when he wakes up. He is shown to be a quiet student, and never concerned about things that happens around him. name: Ranpo Edogawa
description: __Height:__ 168 cm (5'6") The great detective of the Armed Detective Agency. He possesses sharp observation skills that are acknowledged by his coworkers, and he settles difficult cases at the request of the police. Because of his self-confidence, his speech is brazen and child-like. His motto is "If you'll have me, everything will be ok!" He likes logical thinking and fantastic tales.

name: Shinei Nouzen
description: __Height:__ 175 cm Shinei Nouzen is the field commander of Spearhead Squadron. His Personal Name is Undertaker. Having survived five years on the Eastern Front and the Special Reconnaissance Mission, he is considered one of the most elite Processors alive. Among the Eighty-Six, he is known as the Reaper of the Eastern Front. His ability to hear the voices of the Legion allows him to locate the Legion without the use of detection systems like radar. name: Juuzou Suzuya
description: __Height:__ 160 cm (5'3") A Rank 3 Ghoul Investigator. In the past, he went by the name Rei Suzuya. He is the partner of [Yukinori Shinohara](https://anilist.co/character/88408). He is a young man with androgynous appearance. He has many stitches used as both first-aid and fashion. His hair is tied with a stitching string in a roman numeral 13 pattern, with large pupils that leaves an eerie and frightening impression.

name: Souma Yukihira
description: __Height:__ 171 cm He is the son of [Jouichirou Yukihira](https://anilist.co/character/77495) and, until it closed, worked at his father's restaurant, Restaurant Yukihira. Souma fight his odds in the elite school to becoming the best chef in the world even with strong background discrimination of his academy. name: Ryuk
description: The original Shinigami who dropped the Death Note in the human world, which [Light Yagami](https://anilist.co/character/80/Light-Yagami) ended up picking up. Acting out of pure boredom, Ryuk begins the story of Death Note on a whim. Perhaps neutral by nature, Ryuk often refuses to aid Light and instead enjoys watching him struggle for his goal. name: Koutarou Bokuto
description: __Height:__ 185.3 cm Bokuto is a third year student at Fukurodani Academy and is its volleyball team's captain and wing spiker. His spikes pack a powerful punch that others can struggle to receive. Despite this, Bokuto has a tendency to not doing well in the middle of games when getting shut out. Luckily, [Akaashi](https://anilist.co/character/88938) has a whole list of things Bokuto does and tries his best to bring Bokuto back up to his usual self. name: Tetsurou Kuroo
description: __Team:__ Nekoma High School __Height:__ 187.7 cm __Year:__ 3rd Year, class 5 __Number:__ 1 __Position:__ Middle Blocker The captain of the Nekoma High School volleyball club. Kuroo has a somehow manipulative and cunning personality, but cares about his friends and teammates very deeply. As Nekoma's captain he has a sense of responsibility and confidence. Even though Kuroo's a middle blocker, he often uses offensive plays too.
